zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Furnival於1330年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普時，他的父親Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival38歲，母親Joan de Verdun27歲。他於大約1356年與Maud Luvetoft在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1383年4月12日在英國巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾賀特福德。

zh-hans.Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Furnival于1330年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普时，他的父亲Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival38岁，母亲Joan de Verdun27岁。他于大约1356年与Maud Luvetoft在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1383年4月12日在英国巴金哈姆爾法爾納姆 羅雅爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾賀特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Furnival was born in 1330, in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, was 38 and his mother, Joan de Verdun, was 27. He married Maud Luvetoft about 1356, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 12 April 1383, in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Furnival est né en 1330, à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan de Verdun, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Maud Luvetoft environ 1356, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1383, à Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Furnival 1330 in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival 38 und seine Mutter Joan de Verdun 27. Er hat um 1356 in England Maud Luvetoft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. April 1383 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Furnival è nato il nel 1330 nel Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Verdun, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Maud Luvetoft circa 1356, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 12 aprile 1383, nel Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Hertford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Alton, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトン
ja.Sheffield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールド
ja.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォード
ja.Hertford, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォード
ja.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップ
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Furnivalが1330年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップで生まれた時，父Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnivalは38歳，母Joan de Verdunは27歳であった。約1356年にイギリスでMaud Luvetoftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年4月12日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアファルンハム ロイアルで53歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Furnival(이)가 1330년 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Verdun(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1356년 영국에서 Maud Luvetoft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 4월 12일 영국 벅잉함실르 패른함 로야에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Furnival nasceu em 1330, em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Verdun, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Luvetoft aproximadamente 1356, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1383, em Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Furnival родился в 1330 г. в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Verdun, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Luvetoft около 1356 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 12 апреля 1383 г. в местности фарнам рояль, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Furnival nació en 1330, en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan de Verdun, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Maud Luvetoft aproximadamente 1356, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 12 de abril de 1383, en Farnham Royal, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
